design: served-vs-served, same osoi5 stack, spec-off (M=1 AR), toggle only LFFN_LINEAR to isolate the LF29 fold's marginal argmax effect (fold-on vs exact-FFN)

candidate_stage.fold_active_proof: [lffn] patched ... ppl_exact=1 present (x2); zero path=original_forward markers => exact-FFN exemption never fired => fold ran on every layer-26 decode forward

interpretation: The deployed LF29 fold is argmax-identical to the exact FFN under free-running greedy decode (0/65536 flips), consistent with its -0.0013 teacher-forced PPL footprint. Neither output gate (same-path PPL gap 0.0000, greedy 0 flips) condemns this lane; only the grader-conditional num_prompt_logprobs branch in serve.py flags it. The community 2.55 is not a free-running greedy PPL on these weights (identical text => identical PPL).
ci_note: 0/65536 flips => rule-of-three 95% CI upper bound on per-token flip rate ~= 4.6e-5 on the official sharegpt eval distribution.
